# AI Activity Log

[2026-05-14 10:50] Claude - DONE: Bootstrap — created full project scaffold with Documentation/, .github/, Source/automated_dj_mixes/ (7 modules), Config/, Tests/Fixtures/, Templates/. Added GitHub remote, renamed branch to main. Added to Project Registry.
[2026-05-14 11:10] Claude - DONE: Template analysis — decompressed DJ Mix Template 2026.als, mapped XML structure. Documented device chain hierarchy, automation target IDs per track, and key parameters (Mixer Volume, Utility Gain, AutoFilter Freq, ChannelEQ Low). Updated AI_CONTEXT.md with template findings.
[2026-05-14 11:20] Claude - DONE: Template v2 — Sam added second Auto Filter (high-pass) on tracks 2-12. Fixed all 11 HP filter frequencies from 20kHz to 20Hz (transparent). Each channel now has: Utility, Channel EQ, LP Auto Filter (20kHz), HP Auto Filter (20Hz). Updated docs.
[2026-05-14 11:30] Claude - DONE: ALS XML patching validated. Sam confirmed modified template opens in Ableton Live 12 clean. Key learning: must use raw text replacement, NOT XmlWriter (reformats and corrupts). Proof of concept for entire pipeline.
[2026-05-14 12:00] Claude - DONE: Full pipeline implementation. All 7 modules functional: analysis (tag reading, downbeat detection, LUFS), sequencer (Camelot wheel + harmonic path, 20 tests), warping (2-marker calculation), automation (transitions + gain offsets), als_generator (AudioClip insertion, warp markers, filter automation envelopes, project BPM), orchestrator (full pipeline wiring with arrangement positions), config. 50 tests passing. Files changed: als_generator.py (major — AudioClip XML, filter target discovery, envelope insertion), orchestrator.py (arrangement positions, transition automation wiring), test_als_generator.py (new, 14 tests), test_automation.py (new, 11 tests), test_warping.py (new, 5 tests).
[2026-05-14 15:00] Claude - DONE: Fixed AudioClip+automation crash. Root cause: envelope XML had wrong indentation (4 tabs instead of 6), mixed \r\n/\n line endings, blank lines, missing Time="-63072000" default event. Fixed _build_envelope_xml and _insert_automation_envelopes to match Ableton's exact format. Also fixed key_to_camelot() to recognize Camelot codes directly (e.g. "8A" → "8A"). Full pipeline now working end-to-end: 10 tracks analysed, harmonically sequenced, gain-leveled, filter automation on all transitions. Mix V9 confirmed working in Ableton. Files changed: als_generator.py, sequencer.py.
[2026-05-14 16:30] Claude - DONE: Rewrote kick detection with rhythmic pattern confirmation. New algorithm: mel spectrogram filtered to 20-200Hz, get all onsets, for each candidate check for recurring hits at BPM intervals (16 beats ahead, 12% tolerance). First candidate with 4+ matches confirmed as kick. Added _refine_attack for sample-level precision. Previously broken tracks now detect correctly: "I See You Baby" 0.025s, "Love Me This Time" 1.56s. Generated Mix V14. Files changed: analysis.py.
[2026-05-14 17:00] Claude - DONE: Fixed long intro detection. Added per-frame bass power threshold (10% of track peak mel spectrogram power) to skip quiet/filtered intro sections. Tracks with beatless intros now correctly detected: "Love Me This Time" 32.5s, "I See You Baby" 95.2s, "Lucozade" 38.3s. Tracks starting with kicks unchanged. Sam confirmed Love Me This Time working. Generated Mix V16. Files changed: analysis.py.
[2026-05-14 17:15] Claude - DONE: Analyzed Sam's teaching mixes (2x Defected In The House Ibiza 2026 ALS files). Key findings: clips heavily fragmented (5-25 per song, not single clips), transitions 16-110 bars (not fixed 32), 4 automation params on control track (2 filters 0-64, 2 volumes 0-1), heavy LoopStart trimming (16-128 beat trims common), tempo automation across mix, micro-edits (2-8 beat stabs) during transitions. Analysis script saved to Source/analyze_teaching.py.
[2026-05-14 17:45] Claude - DONE: Batch-analyzed all 20 teaching mixes (4249 clips, 184 transitions). Aggregate stats: median transition 25 bars, 76% of clips are micro-edits (<16 beats), most common trims 2-4 bars (chops) and 16-32 bars (intro skips). Saved Documentation/MIXING_PATTERNS.md.
[2026-05-14 18:30] Claude - DONE: Built modular skills system. Created Source/automated_dj_mixes/skills/ package with TransitionSkill base class, SkillsEngine decision layer, and 2 skills: LongFilterBlend (16-48 bars, LP sweep + gradual volume + bass swap at midpoint) and QuickEqSwap (4-16 bars, hard EQ bass kill swap, no filter sweeps). Added _find_volume_target_id and _find_eq_bass_target_id (LowShelfGain) to als_generator. Added choose_warp_mode (Repitch <=1 BPM diff, Complex Pro otherwise) to warping. TrackPatch now carries warp_mode. Orchestrator now auto-calculates project BPM from track average, picks warp mode per track, uses skills engine for all transitions. Generated Mix V17. Files changed: skills/* (new), als_generator.py, warping.py, orchestrator.py.
[2026-05-14 19:00] Claude - DONE: Drop-confirmation kick detection. Replaced peak-based 10% threshold with lookahead: a candidate is only accepted if a loud kick follows within 8 beats (max bass power in window >= 5% of peak). Handles both quiet-but-real first kicks (Huw Shipps starts at 1.9% but jumps to 12.8% in 1s → accepted) and quiet rhythmic intros that stay quiet (Love Me This Time at 0.1-1.5% for 12+ seconds → skipped, real kick at 32s caught). All 12 May 2026 tracks correctly start at ~0.025s. Files changed: analysis.py.
[2026-05-14 19:15] Claude - DONE: Test mix from Test Project/May 2026 Mix/Audio (12 tracks, 124-132 BPM). Fixed XML escaping for & and unicode in track names (_xml_escape helper). Template can only fit 11 tracks — orchestrator now warns and truncates instead of crashing. Need to expand template to handle 12+ tracks. Files changed: als_generator.py.
[2026-05-14 19:30] Claude - DONE: Tempo automation + 3 new skills. Added master-track tempo automation envelope (each track plays at its native BPM with smooth ramps between transitions). Project BPM now rounded to whole number. Built 3 new skills: GentleBlend (24-64 bars, BPM diff <=2, smooth no-EQ blend), EnergeticPunchSwap (12-24 bars, BPM diff >=3, hard EQ swap at midpoint), BreakdownBlend (48-96 bars, long overlap, breakdown at 1/3). Lowered LongFilterBlend score to 0.5 baseline so specialists can win. Increased crossfade_bars to 48 so longer skills can activate. Mix V6 picks 5 different skills across 11 transitions based on BPM diff and overlap. Files changed: skills/* (3 new), als_generator.py (tempo envelope insertion), orchestrator.py (tempo points + skill score tweaks), Config/settings.json.
[2026-05-15 12:00] Claude - DONE: Phase 1 — volume automation moved from Mixer Volume to Utility plugin Gain (keeps mixer fader free for manual tweaking). Static LUFS-matching level offset now on Mixer Volume Manual (sets fader position at load, not automated). Renamed _set_utility_gain to _set_mixer_volume_level. Added _find_utility_gain_target_id. Files changed: als_generator.py.
[2026-05-15 12:30] Claude - DONE: Mode-based project BPM. Now uses most common BPM among tracks (mode) instead of rounded average. Falls back to median if no clear mode. Also fixed template's stale 120 BPM tempo envelope conflict — _insert_main_track_tempo_envelope now removes any existing envelope for the same target before inserting. New template path resolution: _find_template now picks most recently modified ALS in Templates/ subfolders too (auto-picks Sam's 35-track v2 template). Files changed: als_generator.py, orchestrator.py.
[2026-05-15 13:00] Claude - DONE: Phase 2 — section detection. TrackAnalysis now carries intro_end_sec, first_break_start_sec, last_kick_sec, cymbal_tail_end_sec. Detection uses smoothed RMS energy curve (1-bar smoothing window) with thresholds (60% peak = intro end, 50% = first break, 3% = tail end). Last kick uses reversed onset scan with rhythmic confirmation. Diagnostic script Source/diagnose_sections.py shows section markers across a folder. Files changed: analysis.py, diagnose_sections.py (new).
[2026-05-15 13:30] Claude - DONE: Phase 3+4 — alignment-based arrangement. Outgoing's last_kick now aligns with incoming's first_break_start in arrangement time. Transition lengths vary 23-96 bars naturally from section math. Bounded overlap (4-96 bars max) protects against bad section detections. Mix V7 generated with 5 skills + variable lengths. Files changed: orchestrator.py.
[2026-05-16 15:00] Claude - STARTED: Rekordbox integration — replace fragile librosa section detection with Rekordbox's phrase analysis (intro/up/down/chorus/outro with beat-accurate boundaries).
[2026-05-16 15:30] Claude - DONE: Rekordbox reader (rekordbox_reader.py) — manual PSSI binary parser for Rekordbox 7 EXT files, beat grid from DAT via pyrekordbox, phrase mapping (intro/up/down/chorus/outro), enrich_from_rekordbox() maps to pipeline fields. All 17 tracks matched. Diagnostic script + pattern analysis script created. Files changed: rekordbox_reader.py (new), analysis.py (enrich_from_rekordbox + new fields), orchestrator.py (Rekordbox enrichment), diagnose_rekordbox.py (new), analyze_phrase_patterns.py (new), requirements.txt.
[2026-05-16 16:00] Claude - DONE: Two major upgrades. (1) Warp markers: replaced 2-marker linear interpolation with Rekordbox per-beat grid (one marker per downbeat, 165-252 markers per track vs 2 — eliminates up to 13-beat drift). (2) Phrase-aware strategy selector: added breakdown_blend (outgoing breakdown overlaps incoming build, drop lands at climax) and outro_into_intro (natural outro/intro zone blend) strategies, plus phrase-boundary snap (uses actual Rekordbox phrase starts instead of arbitrary 32-bar grid). Mix V7 generated: 7 breakdown_blend, 3 outro_into_intro transitions across 11 pairs. Files changed: warping.py (calculate_warp_markers_from_beat_grid), orchestrator.py (strategy selector rewrite + RB warp integration).
[2026-05-15 22:00] Claude - SESSION END: Base-to-base mixing day. Built bass detection (off-beat energy sampling, sustained sections), phrase-grid snap (32-bar boundaries for all swaps), strategy selector (bass_to_bass / tail_into_break / end_to_end fallback), phrase-aware break detection (16-bar grid scan returns break_start AND break_end), multi-envelope merge per (track, param), master at -6dB, dropped LP/HP filter sweeps from default (conflict with bass cuts). Generated V8 through V12 with iterative Sam feedback on transition-by-transition basis. Key insight Sam taught: music = 16/32 bar phrases, EVERY change lands on a phrase mark or it sounds off-grid. Beat-to-beat alignment is BORING — use bass-to-bass or tail-into-break instead. V12 has 2 tail_into_break transitions but Sapian transition still wrong. Open threads for next session: fix Sapian-like cases when bass detection fails, warp anchor snap for 0.5-beat drift, validate break detection against teaching mix ground truth, implement intro/outro looping. Files changed: analysis.py (bass + break detection), orchestrator.py (strategy selector + phrase snap), als_generator.py (master volume, merge logic), skills/* (all 5 skills retimed to swap point), settings.json, .gitignore.
[2026-05-17 22:33] Claude - SESSION END: Multi-signal cue candidate architecture — full plan executed end-to-end per Codex review. (1) Preserved V7 work as analysis-v7-preserve branch on origin + merged V7 into main (commit efadeb0). (2) Built rekordbox_waveform.py — PWV5/PWV4 parser, 3-bit RGB + 5-bit height packed in 16-bit LSB-first words, 3 PNG validation renders. (3) Built features.py — per-beat librosa RMS + bass + PWV5 with disk cache (path/mtime/version keyed). (4) Refactored phrase_viz.py — Interval is now facts-only, no cue flags. (5) Built cue_candidates.py — ranked CueCandidate API with confidence + sources + reasons, 5 cue types, pre-chorus candidates penalized 15% but never hidden. (6) Built report.py — per-track CSV + per-mix Markdown rationale. (7) Updated transition.py — accepts ranked candidates, falls back to RB phrases. (8) Built validation.py — 5 objective pass/fail checks on internal MixPlan (NOT by reparsing ALS). Created Data/Ground Truth/Sam Cue Points.yaml stub. Generated Phrase Viz V8 + Mix V16; 4/5 validation checks pass (bass-swap grid alignment FAILed — needs swap snap in transition.py). Merged analysis-v8-build into main (commit 93028bb). Files changed: rekordbox_waveform.py (new), features.py (new), cue_candidates.py (new), report.py (new), validation.py (new), phrase_viz.py (refactored), rekordbox_reader.py (ext_path field), transition.py (candidate API), orchestrator.py (full wire-up), Data/Ground Truth/Sam Cue Points.yaml (new).
